testcase.name: contextLoads
testcase.system-out:
09:50:12.555 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.playConnect.PlayConnectApplicationTests]: PlayConnectApplicationTests does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 09:50:12.750 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.playConnect.PlayConnectApplication for test class com.playConnect.PlayConnectApplicationTests

Found 6 JPA repository interfaces. 2026-04-11T09:50:15.807+05:30 INFO 22800 --- [PlayConnect] [ main] o.hibernate.jpa.internal.util.LogHelper : HHH000204: Processing PersistenceUnitInfo [name: default] 2026-04-11T09:50:15.870+05:30 INFO 22800 --- [PlayConnect] [ main] org.hibernate.Version : HHH000412: Hibernate ORM core version 6.4.4.Final 2026-04-11T09:50:15.911+05:30 INFO 22800 --- [PlayConnect] [ main] o.h.c.internal.RegionFactoryInitiator : HHH000026: Second-level cache disabled 2026-04-11T09:50:16.021+05:30 INFO 22800 --- [PlayConnect] [ main] o.s.o.j.p.SpringPersistenceUnitInfo : No LoadTimeWeaver setup: ignoring JPA class transformer 2026-04-11T09:50:16.070+05:30 INFO 22800 --- [PlayConnect] [ main] com.zaxxer.hikari.HikariDataSource : HikariPool-1 - Starting... 2026-04-11T09:50:16.284+05:30 INFO 22800 --- [PlayConnect] [ main] com.zaxxer.hikari.pool.HikariPool : HikariPool-1 - Added connection conn0: url=jdbc:h2:mem:playconnect user=SA 2026-04-11T09:50:16.286+05:30 INFO 22800 --- [PlayConnect] [ main] com.zaxxer.hikari.HikariDataSource : HikariPool-1 - Start completed. 2026-04-11T09:50:16.315+05:30 WARN 22800 --- [PlayConnect] [ main] org.hibernate.orm.deprecation : HHH90000025: H2Dialect does not need to be specified explicitly using 'hibernate.dialect' (remove the property setting and it will be selected by default) 2026-04-11T09:50:17.207+05:30 INFO 22800 --- [PlayConnect] [ main] o.h.e.t.j.p.i.JtaPlatformInitiator : HHH000489: No JTA platform available (set 'hibernate.transaction.jta.platform' to enable JTA platform integration) 2026-04-11T09:50:17.264+05:30 WARN 22800 --- [PlayConnect] [ main] o.h.t.s.i.ExceptionHandlerLoggedImpl : GenerationTarget encountered exception accepting command : Error executing DDL " create index idx_game_players_game_id on game_players (game_id)" via JDBC [Index "IDX_GAME_PLAYERS_GAME_ID" already exists;]
